jd_text: The Opportunity: A boutique British Recruitment Agency specializing in high-value Tech and Energy placements is expanding into the UAE/KSA. We are bypassing the traditional "employee" model and seeking a Strategic Launch Partner to lead Business Development in the region. The Partnership Model: Zero Salary / High Reward: This is a commission-only, 50/50 profit-sharing partnership. Your Role: High-level Business Development, Client Acquisition, and Account Management in the UAE/KSA. Our Role: We provide the British brand credibility, 20+ years of HR Director-level "Delivery," and the operational infrastructure. Ideal Candidate: You must be currently based in Dubai with your own residency (Spouse/Freelance/Golden Visa). Proven track record of signing Retained or Exclusive terms with major entities in AI, Cybersecurity, or Energy. The entrepreneurial mindset to treat this as your own business. Why Join Us? Most agencies in Dubai are "CV factories." We are a British consultancy that leads with HR Director-level insights . You aren't just selling a recruiter; you are selling a partnership that guarantees the highest level of candidate vetting in the market.
